title: Update contact email address to sv.couverture95@gmail.com

requirements.summary: Replace all instances of the existing email address with 'sv.couverture95@gmail.com' across the Contact section, Footer, and JSON-LD structured data, ensuring all emails are clickable mailto: links with consistent formatting
acceptanceCriteria: The email 'sv.couverture95@gmail.com' appears in the Contact section info card.
The email 'sv.couverture95@gmail.com' appears in the Footer contact details.
If an email field exists in the JSON-LD LocalBusiness structured data in index.html, it is updated to 'sv.couverture95@gmail.com'.
Every displayed email is a clickable mailto:sv.couverture95@gmail.com link.
No old or placeholder email address remains anywhere on the site.

file_operations.description: Update the email address in the Contact section info card to 'sv.couverture95@gmail.com' and ensure it is rendered as a clickable mailto: link with consistent formatting matching the existing phone number links

Update the email address in the Footer contact details to 'sv.couverture95@gmail.com' and ensure it is rendered as a clickable mailto: link with consistent formatting matching other footer contact information

If an email field exists in the JSON-LD LocalBusiness structured data, update it to 'sv.couverture95@gmail.com'. If no email field is present, add one with the new email address to improve SEO and local business discoverability
